mapper.select:
SELECT folder_id, parent_id, folder_name, scope, owner_dept_id, owner_no, created_at FROM platform_v3.dl_folder WHERE scope = 'COMPANY'
OR (scope = 'DEPT' AND owner_dept_id = #{deptId})
OR (scope = 'PERSONAL' AND owner_no = #{employeeNo})
ORDER BY scope, COALESCE(parent_id, 0), folder_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.dl_folder (parent_id, folder_name, scope, owner_dept_id, owner_no, created_at) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{folderName}, #{scope}, #{ownerDeptId}, #{ownerNo}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM platform_v3.dl_folder WHERE parent_id = #{folderId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM platform_v3.dl_file WHERE folder_id = #{folderId}

SELECT f.file_id, f.folder_id, f.file_name, f.object_key, f.size_bytes, f.mime_type, f.tags, f.uploader_no, f.uploaded_at, f.download_count, COALESCE(e.employee_name, f.uploader_no) AS uploader_name FROM platform_v3.dl_file f LEFT JOIN platform_v3.org_employee e ON f.uploader_no = e.employee_no WHERE f.folder_id = #{folderId}
AND f.file_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND f.tags ILIKE '%' || #{tag} || '%'
ORDER BY f.uploaded_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT f.file_id, f.folder_id, f.file_name, f.object_key, f.size_bytes, f.mime_type, f.tags, f.uploader_no, f.uploaded_at, f.download_count, COALESCE(e.employee_name, f.uploader_no) AS uploader_name, fo.folder_name, fo.scope FROM platform_v3.dl_file f JOIN platform_v3.dl_folder fo ON f.folder_id = fo.folder_id LEFT JOIN platform_v3.org_employee e ON f.uploader_no = e.employee_no WHERE ( fo.scope = 'COMPANY'
OR (fo.scope = 'DEPT' AND fo.owner_dept_id = #{deptId})
OR (fo.scope = 'PERSONAL' AND fo.owner_no = #{employeeNo})
)
AND f.file_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND f.tags ILIKE '%' || #{tag} || '%'
ORDER BY f.uploaded_at DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT file_id, folder_id, file_name, object_key, size_bytes, mime_type, tags, uploader_no, uploaded_at, download_count FROM platform_v3.dl_file WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.dl_file (folder_id, file_name, object_key, size_bytes, mime_type, tags, uploader_no, uploaded_at) VALUES (#{folderId}, #{fileName}, #{objectKey}, #{sizeBytes}, #{mimeType}, #{tags}, #{uploaderNo}, NOW())
